examples.review_snippet: Attorney Brooks fought hard for me and delivered a strong result. I'd recommend them to friends. The one thing I'd change is more frequent proactive updates — I had to initiate most check-ins myself.
Ms. Reyes fought hard for me and delivered a strong result. I'd recommend them to friends. The one thing I'd change is more frequent proactive updates — I had to initiate most check-ins myself.
Solid but not spectacular. Attorney Walsh handled the basics well but I expected more strategic guidance. For straightforward matters I'd return. For complex litigation I'd look elsewhere.
Mixed experience with their team. Some of the staff were very helpful, others seemed indifferent. The final result was satisfactory. Might use them again for a simpler matter.

Attorney Walsh was fantastic to work with. Clear communicator, aggressive negotiator, and always available. Slight billing surprise at the end keeps this at 4 stars, but I'd use them again without hes

Mr. Harris is clearly a skilled attorney. Got a great result for our business dispute. Communication was excellent. Knocking off one star because the timeline ran about 2 months longer than estimated.

Won my case with the help of their office. The legal strategy was spot-on. I'm giving 4 stars instead of 5 because the paralegal team seemed overloaded and dropped the ball on a few document requests.
Really pleased with Ms. Thompson's representation. Knowledgeable, honest, and genuinely cared about my situation. Billing was on the higher end of what I expected, hence 4 stars instead of 5.

candidate_negation_guards.phrase: billing was on the higher end

examples.review_snippet: Really pleased with Ms. Thompson's representation. Knowledgeable, honest, and genuinely cared about my situation. Billing was on the higher end of what I expected, hence 4 stars instead of 5.
Strong recommend for their team with one caveat — the intake process was slow and confusing. Once the case got rolling, everything was excellent. End result exceeded my expectations.
Outstanding experience from start to finish with their team. Clear communication, transparent billing, and a fantastic outcome. This is what great legal representation looks like.
I can't say enough good things about this law office. Professional, compassionate, and incredibly effective. They turned a terrifying situation into a manageable one. 10/10.
